    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "3, ['Asking for ages and interests of grandchildren or family visitors to tailor property or service recommendations', 'Request to include a “family safety compliance check” or multi-generational accessibility certification in legal/survey reports', 'Offering a Senior Move Safety Assessment (mobility hazard check and layout recommendations)']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "13, ['Providing property listings with type, price, size, layout, accessibility features, amenities, and taxes', 'Describing property maintenance level and optional lawn/snow services', 'Including condo fees and what utilities are covered', 'Specifying accessibility features like walk-in shower, wide doorways, and ramp access', 'Mentioning proximity to medical, shopping, and transit', 'Indicating property availability and move-in readiness', 'Including energy-efficient and smart home features', 'Offering legal service packages with cost, currency, and service level', 'Offering property survey packages with costs and scope', 'Providing moving service options with level, cost, and included features', 'Providing utility setup service options with cost, currency, and included utilities', 'Offering coordination of furniture donation/disposal services as part of moving or downsizing support', 'Proposing preparation of cost breakdown or total package summary for approval']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 3, ['Asking for ages and interests of grandchildren or family visitors to tailor property or service recommendations', 'Request to include a “family safety compliance check” or multi-generational accessibility certification in legal/survey reports', 'Offering a Senior Move Safety Assessment (mobility hazard check and layout recommendations)']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 13, ['Providing property listings with type, price, size, layout, accessibility features, amenities, and taxes', 'Describing property maintenance level and optional lawn/snow services', 'Including condo fees and what utilities are covered', 'Specifying accessibility features like walk-in shower, wide doorways, and ramp access', 'Mentioning proximity to medical, shopping, and transit', 'Indicating property availability and move-in readiness', 'Including energy-efficient and smart home features', 'Offering legal service packages with cost, currency, and service level', 'Offering property survey packages with costs and scope', 'Providing moving service options with level, cost, and included features', 'Providing utility setup service options with cost, currency, and included utilities', 'Offering coordination of furniture donation/disposal services as part of moving or downsizing support', 'Proposing preparation of cost breakdown or total package summary for approval']
